description: Twitter, now branded as X, is a social networking platform for publishing and consuming short-form posts, media, conversations, and related account and advertising data. Its developer platform provides programmatic access to X content and account capabilities through APIs and AI-tool integrations.
summary: twitter.com exposes two documented HTTP API generations (current v2 and legacy v1.1), plus hosted MCP endpoints for the API and docs, and an official `xurl` CLI used to authenticate and bridge MCP access.
